allow: Bash(python -c "from modes import MODES, get_mode; from context import get_context; from memory import log_mode_switch; from telegram_bot import send_mode_alert; print\('All imports OK'\); ctx = get_context\(\); mode = get_mode\(ctx\); print\(f'Current mode: {mode.name} | zone: {ctx[\\"location_zone\\"]} | hour: {ctx[\\"hour\\"]} | day: {ctx[\\"day\\"]}'\)")
